[LANG] Python [FRAMEWORK] Flask [METHOD] PUT [PATH] /api/image_records/{{id}} [CODE] @app.route('/api/image_records', methods=['POST'])
def alter_image():
    data = request.get_json()
    current_image = Image(**data)
    db.session.add(current_image)
    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify(current_image.to_dict()), 201

def add_team():
    data = request.get_json()
